## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the positive user experience, highlighting the product's effectiveness in saving time and simplifying gardening tasks. People appreciate the continuous improvements to the software, which allows them to focus more on gardening rather than planning. Consumers also commend the knowledgeable and dedicated staff, noting their genuine care for customers and their gardening success. The app and website are frequently mentioned for their brilliant design, ease of use, and the valuable tools they offer, making garden planning and organization much more efficient for gardeners of all levels.See more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Most reviewers were unhappy with their experience overall. Many people were dissatisfied with the customer service, finding it unresponsive and difficult to reach a real person, often encountering automated replies. Customers also frequently reported issues with their orders, including incorrect shipments, missing items, and problems with delivery. A significant number of consumers were unhappy with the subscription model, citing issues with billing and difficulties in canceling or managing their subscriptions. Some people were dissatisfied with the product itself, mentioning issues like broken capsules, stale pills, and a lack of noticeable effects. Conversely, a small portion of people felt the product was effective, reporting positive changes in their health and overall well-being. A few other people also felt that the customer service was helpful and responsive when they needed assistance.See more
